class.name: ResonancePlayerConfig
class.brief_description: Per-source configuration for ResonancePlayer. Link for reusable presets.
class.description: Per-source configuration for ResonancePlayer. Assign from ResonancePlayer as player_config for reusable presets. Save as .tres for sharing across scenes. Falls back to member vars when null. pathing_probe_volume stays on the player node (scene-specific).

method.name: get_bus_name_effective
method.description: Returns effective bus for Direct + Pathing. Use Global = global_fallback. Custom = bus_name or global_fallback if empty.

method.name: get_reverb_bus_name_effective
method.description: Returns effective reverb bus name. Use Global = global_fallback. Custom = reverb_bus_name or global_fallback if empty.

method.name: create_default
method.description: Creates default player config for sources without one assigned.

members.member: Distance (meters) at which sound is at full volume.
Max distance (meters) for attenuation.

Inverse (0) = Steam inverse distance on the direct path. Linear (1), Curve (2), or Disabled (3): simulator **distance attenuation** off on the direct path (unity LOS gain until occlusion/transmission/air apply)—not muting the source. Older resources could use [code]distance_attenuation_simulation_enabled = false[/code] with mode 0 — that migrates to mode 3 at runtime.
Custom attenuation curve. Used when attenuation_mode is Curve.
Radius of the sound source in meters.
Enable distance-based air absorption.
Air absorption source: Simulation (0) = physics-based, User Defined (1) = use low/mid/high sliders.
Low-band (≤800 Hz) EQ. 0 = fully attenuated, 1 = no change. Only when air_absorption_input is User Defined.
Mid-band (800 Hz–8 kHz) EQ.
High-band (≥8 kHz) EQ.
Bus for Direct + Pathing. -1 = Use Global (RuntimeConfig.bus), 0 = Custom (use bus_name).
Bus for Direct + Pathing when bus_override is Custom. Must exist in Audio Bus Layout.
Reverb bus override. -1 = Use Global (RuntimeConfig.reverb_bus_name), 0 = Custom (use reverb_bus_name).
Bus for reverb when reverb_bus_override is Custom. Must exist in Audio Bus Layout.
Per-source binaural override. -1 = use global (RuntimeConfig.reverb_binaural), 0 = panning, 1 = force HRTF.
Enable directional sound source.
Shape: 0 = Omnidirectional, 1 = Dipole.
Sharpness of the directivity pattern (0-4). Only when directivity_input is Simulation.
Directivity source: 0=Simulation (dipole), 1=User Defined (use directivity_value).
Directivity attenuation (0-1). Only when directivity_input is User Defined.
Blends output between 2D (0, stereo panning without HRTF on the dry path) and full 3D spatial audio (1). Intermediate values mix both (e.g. UI vs world-attached sources).
Encode point source to Ambisonics before binaural.
Minimum seconds between full playback-parameter updates. 0 = every frame (subject to other gating).
Minimum source movement (meters) to trigger a full update when combined with playback_parameter_min_interval.

Exponential smoothing time constant (seconds) for simulation-derived occlusion and transmission. 0 = off. When greater than 0, playback parameters are pushed every frame while smoothing applies. Only Simulation Defined occlusion/transmission.
Reflections simulation: -1=Use Global (baked reverb), 0=Realtime, 1=Baked Reverb, 2=Baked Static Source, 3=Baked Static Listener.
When reflections_type is Baked Static Source: node whose position was baked. Empty = use player position.
When reflections_type is Baked Static Listener: node (e.g. listener) whose position was baked. Empty = use active listener.
Enable reflections for this source. -1=Use Global, 0=Disabled, 1=Enabled.
Enable pathing for this source. -1=Use Global, 0=Disabled, 1=Enabled.
When [code]false[/code], occlusion rays are not simulated; use User Defined [member occlusion_input] and [member occlusion_value] for manual occlusion.
Occlusion source: 0=Simulation (physics), 1=User Defined (use occlusion_value).
Occlusion attenuation (0-1). Only when occlusion_input is User Defined.

-1 = use [url=#ResonanceRuntimeConfig]ResonanceRuntimeConfig[/url] [member ResonanceRuntimeConfig.occlusion_type]. 0 = Raycast. 1 = Volumetric ([member occlusion_samples]). Applies when using simulation occlusion.

Rays per source for volumetric occlusion (1–64, Steam Audio [code]numOcclusionSamples[/code]). Used when [member ResonanceRuntimeConfig.occlusion_type] is Volumetric. Higher = more stable occlusion fraction near boundaries; not the same as [member ResonanceRuntimeConfig.transmission_type] (FreqIndependent/FreqDependent).
When [code]false[/code], transmission through geometry is not simulated; use User Defined [member transmission_input] for manual bands.
Transmission source: 0=Simulation, 1=User Defined (use transmission low/mid/high).
Low-band transmission (0-1). Only when transmission_input is User Defined.
Mid-band transmission (0-1). Only when transmission_input is User Defined.
High-band transmission (0-1). Only when transmission_input is User Defined.
-1 = use runtime transmission type. 0 = frequency-independent. 1 = frequency-dependent (3-band), for the direct effect only.

Max surfaces along the transmission path from listener (1–256; Steam Audio [code]numTransmissionRays[/code]). Limits depth of stacked surfaces on the path, not lateral blending between materials at an edge.

Path validation (dynamic occlusion of baked paths). [code]-1[/code] = Use Global ([member ResonanceRuntimeConfig.path_validation_enabled]). [code]0[/code] = Disabled. [code]1[/code] = Enabled. Costs scale with [member ResonanceRuntimeConfig.pathing_num_vis_samples] and ray tracer; tune [member ResonanceRuntimeConfig.simulation_update_interval] and use [method ResonanceServer.get_simulation_worker_timing] for [code]us_run_pathing[/code].

Find alternate paths when a baked path is occluded. [code]-1[/code] = Use Global ([member ResonanceRuntimeConfig.find_alternate_paths]). [code]0[/code] = Disabled. [code]1[/code] = Enabled. Only effective when path validation is on for this source. Very CPU-heavy — tune [member ResonanceRuntimeConfig.simulation_update_interval] and [member ResonanceRuntimeConfig.pathing_num_vis_samples] when enabling.
Volume of the direct sound path (0-10).
Volume of reflections and reverb (0-10).
Volume of pathing (0-10).
Per-source EQ multiplier for low band.
Per-source EQ multiplier for mid band.
Per-source EQ multiplier for high band.
Samples before parametric part starts. -1 = use simulation value.
Apply HRTF to reflections (reverb) for this source. Shown under Spatialization in the inspector. -1=Use Global, 0=Disabled, 1=Enabled.
Apply HRTF to pathing for this source. Shown under Spatialization in the inspector. -1=Use Global ([member ResonanceRuntimeConfig.reverb_binaural]), 0=Disabled (less CPU), 1=Enabled.
-1 = use [member ResonanceRuntimeConfig.hrtf_interpolation_bilinear]. 0 = nearest HRTF (faster). 1 = bilinear (smoother motion).
Per-source perspective correction. -1 = use global, 0 = disabled, 1 = enabled.
Factor for on-screen position mapping (0.5–2.0). Used when override is Enabled.
